title: TACEO Privacy-First Stablecoin Transfers with Roman Walch | NoirCon 3 Devconnect 2025
description:
Roman Walch, Lead Cryptographer at TACEO, leads this workshop covering:

- MPC 101 and coSNARKs
- Single-user vs. multi-user private state
- From Noir to coNoir (collaborative Noir)
- Private stablecoin transfers with ZK / ZK + MPC
